page_content:
Prerequisite: CPSF101.

Restriction: Must be in the College Park Scholars Life Sciences program. Credit Only Granted for. CPSF200 or CPSP218L.

Formerly: CPSP218L.

CPSG - College Park Scholars- Science and Global Change

CPSG100 College Park Scholars: Science & Global Change First-Year Colloquium | (1 Credit)

Introductory colloquium: Examination of issues related to science and global change.

Restriction: Students must be enrolled in the College Park Scholars Science & Global Change (CPSG) program.

CPSG101 College Park Scholars: Science & Global Change First-Year Colloquium II (1 Credit)

Introductory colloquium II: Continued examination of issues related to science and global change.
